channel.title: Gradio auf Nicky Reinert
channel.description: Blog & projects by Nicky Reinert (Institute for Digital Challenges): web development & software development, SEO & analytics, hosting & DevOps, WordPress & Hugo, tools & projects, data protection & digital culture — plus content on AI and autism & society.

item.title: How to Persist User Configuration in a Gradio App with Cookies
item.description: I am currently building some kind of playground for Huggingface’s text-2-image models. This app offers more than a dozen configuration parameters. The problem: Every time the user reloads the page, all parameters are gone. Here’s my solution to cope with that. Gradio has a gr.Stateobject that allows …
item.dc:subject: Lesezeit: 5 Minuten
